extraction.one_line_summary: DENNIS Rowan bridged solo to the break on the final climb descent, took stage and yellow jersey by 1 second after mechanical teammate HINDLEY cramped.
tactical_patterns: MATTHEWS chain drop at back triggered immediate attack signals, showing peloton monitors race radio for vulnerability exploitation opportunities.
DENNIS bridged alone to breakaway group after surviving final climb, revealing ex-TT champions can time trial uphill gaps closed under 8km.
Intermediate sprint bonus seconds contested hard by GC favorites early stage, indicating overall gaps expected to remain tight throughout race.
VINE prioritized KOM points over stage despite being in winning move, signaling jersey competition took precedence over victory.

rider_signals.DENNIS Rowan: positive: bridged 45-second gap solo on climb/descent within 8km, showing exceptional pursuit power while others sat on in break
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: negative: chain drop mechanical at critical corner acceleration moment eliminated GC contention despite strong intermediate sprint showing
rider_signals.HINDLEY Jai: negative: cramped badly on final climb despite being in winning move, suggesting insufficient condition recovery or pacing error
rider_signals.VINE Jay: neutral: prioritized KOM jersey over stage win by leading climb but not contesting sprint, tactical decision rather than weakness
